title: Laelfe 12 Pcs Hot Pink Roses Artificial Flowers, Single Long Stem Faux Silk Fuchsia Roses Fake Flowers for Wedding Bridal Bouquets Home Party Arrangment Hotel Garden Decorations (Fuchsia)
features: 💐【Size Details: Larger Flower Head Than Competitors】These hot pink artifical flowers have an overall length of approx. 53.3 cm/21 inches, and the flower head is about 4 inches/10.1 cm – 2 cm larger than most similar products on the market (their flower heads are only 8 cm). It’s close to the size of real roses, and stays vibrant without fading.

💐【Package Includings: Sufficient Quantity + Rich Colors】You will get 12 pcs of hot pink artificial roses in one package. Plus, we offer many popular colors to choose from (black, blue, red, yellow, green, white, pink, purple, etc.), so you can mix and match to fit your wedding, Christmas, or daily home decor style.

💐【High Quality: Realistic & Durable & Easy to Shape】These hot pink fake roses are made of 90% high-quality silk + 10% plastic (with metal wire as the skeleton inside the long stem, wrapped in plastic) – the silk petals feel soft and look lifelike, just like fresh roses. The stem can be freely trimmed to fit vases of different heights or bent to match your decor shape (e.g., bouquets, flower arches).

💐【Wide Range of Use: Perfect for Romantic Ambiance & Versatile Decor】This fuchsia faux rose is ideal for creating a strong romantic vibe – many customers use it for key moments like engagement proposals, wedding ceremonies, Valentine’s Day surprises, anniversaries, or lover’s birthdays (no need to worry about fresh flowers wilting!).

💐【Easy to Maintain: No Hassle & DIY-Friendly】Unlike fresh roses that need watering, pruning, and wilt quickly, these silk fuchsia roses require zero daily maintenance – perfect for busy people, plant beginners, or anyone with pollen allergies (no more sneezing from fresh flower pollen!). Plus, you can freely match them with other artificial flowers (starflowers, tulips, peonies, etc.) to DIY unique bouquets, flower arches, or table centerpieces – unleash your creativity without worrying about flowers fading or wilting.
description: Product Description Specification: ▸Material: Silk Cloth + Plastic ▸Flower Head: Diameter about 4 inches ▸Stem Length: About 17 inches, made of plastic and wire. Not easy to break had to cut with wire cutter. ▸Total Length: About 21 in ▸What You Get: 12 Pcs Artificial Roses ▸Use Range: Halloween, Home, Wedding, Hotel, Party, Graduation Ceremony, etc. Tips： They may expressed in shipment, but won't affect the quality, please fume it with vapour and arrange the leaves after received them, cut or bend the branches as you like. The rose stem has artificial thorns please be carefull when touching. The stems are designed to be slightly longer .You can bend or prune them to the way you like.
